description_long: This is a vintage-style scooter with a streamlined, rounded body painted in a vibrant orange with cream accents. The front features a prominent headlight, chrome handlebars with a single round mirror, and a metallic fender. The seat is upholstered in dark red-brown leather and is long enough to accommodate two riders. The sides display metallic trim, air vents, and a rear luggage rack above the back wheel, along with a visible license plate. The wheels are black with metallic rims, and the footboard is ribbed for grip, making it suitable for urban commuting.
description: A vintage orange and cream scooter with a rounded body, chrome details, and a dark red-brown leather seat. Features include a front headlight, rear luggage rack, and metallic trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded orange and cream body, central headlight, chrome handlebars, and a single round mirror.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated seat, ribbed footboard, metallic trim, and visible air vents.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the luggage rack, license plate, and the full length of the seat and footboard.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the seat, footboard, and handlebar details.
attribute_deck_design: elongated, ribbed metallic footboard with grip lines, medium width
attribute_brand_logo: Red script logo on the front upper left side
